title: Department of Financial Affairs - Advance Payment
content:
Department of Financial Affairs - Advance Payment

Our students who will pay in advance should fill in the following IBAN numbers with the student's name, surname and T.C. You can deposit by specifying your ID number. Advance payment discount of 5% is applied.

KUVEYTTÜRK Participation Bank Account Information

Account Name : İSTANBUL ESENYURT UNIVERSITY

IBAN Number: TR08 0020 5000 0938 9892 5000 01

Halkbank Account Information

Account Name : İSTANBUL ESENYURT UNIVERSITY

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
